title: FEQO 36 Pcs Artificial Eucalyptus Stems Dark Brown Leaves Faux Eucalyptus Stems Branches 15 inch for Wedding Bouquet Home Deco
features: Package include: 36 pcs artificial eucalyptus stems are included, a large quantity dark brown eucalyptus stems for vase and home decoration
Stem size: length of the eucalyptus stems about 15 inch, you can cut or twist the wire to adjust the artificial stems'length on your demand
Premium material: FEQO faux eucalyptus stems are made of premium plastic, in order to matching with other bouquets better, the eucalyptus stems are added with elastic wire

Well match: these dark brown eucalyptus stems are great for both single stem vase decor and branches decor, ideal for living room, office and banquet, add lively color to your party and wedding, the eucalyptus stems also can be used to DIY flowers arrangements, bouquets, centerpieces and so on

Wide application: the artificial eucalyptus stems decor are great for celebrations, anniversaries, parties and wedding; various of color leaves are ideal choice for your home decor, suitable for fall harvest, Thanksgiving, Spring and Christmas party
description: FEQO 36 Pcs Artificial Eucalyptus Stems Dark Brown Leaves Faux Eucalyptus Stems Branches 15 inch for Wedding Bouquet Home Deco
